column2: None of the JAT wheels are available on GMC Brigadier 8000
JAT medium doubles on TUZ 16 "Actaeon" and TUZ 108 "Warthog" instead of singles
Light JAT wheels on Chevrolet Apache, Khan 39 Marshall and YAR 87, which have suspension tuned for medium wheels. Will lead to softer suspension than intended
Superheavy JAT wheels on TUZ 420 "Tatarin", which has suspension tuned for heavy wheels. Will lead to much stiffer suspension than intended
JAT HHD, JAT OHS and JAT MHS IV, V and VI wheels are not aligned properly on International Paystar 5070, appear floating to the side of the wheel hubs
JAT MS I and II have reversed treads on both front and rear tires
JAT OHS III have reverse treads on both front and rear tires
JAT MHS I and III have reversed treads on both front and rear tires
JAT ATMD III have reversed treads on both front and rear tires
JAT MMD I have reversed treads on front tires only
JAT MMD II and III have reversed treads on rear tires only
